resources.string: DeviceSync Manager allows authorized users to remotely monitor and manage their own Android devices from a secure web dashboard. All features require explicit user consent and visible notifications are displayed whenever remote control is active.

DeviceSync Manager uses Accessibility Services to perform touch-based UI automation only when the user has signed in, paired the device, and explicitly started the remote control session. A persistent notification is always visible during active sessions.
Displays a persistent notification while authorized remote monitoring is active on your device
Remote monitoring is running. Tap to manage.

This will allow the authorized dashboard to:

• View device information and battery status
• Take screenshots on demand
• Stream the screen (with your permission)
• Send touch gestures to this device

A persistent notification will always be visible while this is active. Only proceed if this is your own device or you have explicit permission from the device owner.

DeviceSync Manager needs the following permissions:

• Storage/Media: To access and transfer files remotely
• Notifications: To keep the sync service running in the background

These are only used when remote monitoring is actively enabled by you.
